requirement_topic.en: NRS 097 and Municipal Grid Connection for Embedded Generation
requirement_topic.zh: 嵌入式发电的NRS 097及市政并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: 嵌入式發電的NRS 097及市政併網要求

summary.en: South African embedded-generation projects, including BESS paired with PV or bidirectional inverters, commonly use NRS 097 requirements and municipal or utility processes for inverter approval, anti-islanding, protection settings, power quality, metering, commissioning, and permission to connect. Requirements depend on municipality, distributor, voltage level, inverter type, export limit, and whether the system can energise the grid.
summary.zh: 南非嵌入式发电项目，包括与光伏或双向逆变器配套的BESS，通常采用NRS 097要求以及市政或电力分销商流程来管理逆变器批准、防孤岛、保护定值、电能质量、计量、调试和并网许可。要求取决于市政辖区、配电主体、电压等级、逆变器类型、反送电限制以及系统是否可能向电网送电。
summary.zht: 南非嵌入式發電項目，包括與光伏或雙向逆變器配套的BESS，通常採用NRS 097要求以及市政或電力分銷商流程來管理逆變器批准、防孤島、保護定值、電能品質、計量、調試和併網許可。要求取決於市政轄區、配電主體、電壓等級、逆變器類型、反送電限制以及系統是否可能向電網送電。

standards_or_laws: NRS 097 series for grid interconnection of embedded generation
Municipal or distribution utility small-scale embedded generation approval processes
Project-specific inverter, protection, metering, and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 34120-2023 for electrochemical storage PCS and GB/T 36558-2023 for grid-connected electrochemical energy storage systems. These reports should be mapped to South African NRS 097 and municipal inverter-list or connection requirements rather than treated as direct substitutes. A proposed update to GB/T 36558-2023 with a claimed 2024-07-01 implementation date was not verified against an official source for this row, so the existing 2022 reference is retained.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 34120-2023作为电化学储能变流器依据，并采用GB/T 36558-2023作为电化学储能系统并网依据。这些报告应映射至南非NRS 097及市政逆变器清单或并网要求，而不能视为直接替代。关于GB/T 36558-2023及其声称2024-07-01实施日期的拟议更新，本行未能通过官方来源核验，因此保留现有2022引用。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 34120-2023作為電化學儲能變流器依據，並採用GB/T 36558-2023作為電化學儲能系統併網依據。這些報告應映射至南非NRS 097及市政逆變器清單或併網要求，而不能視為直接替代。關於GB/T 36558-2023及其聲稱2024-07-01實施日期的擬議更新，本行未能通過官方來源核驗，因此保留現有2022引用。

gap.en: Chinese PCS or inverter evidence must be translated into the local grid-connection package: inverter certificates, anti-islanding settings, protection relays, export-control logic, single-line diagrams, metering design, commissioning records, and the municipality or distributor's approval forms.
gap.zh: 中国PCS或逆变器证据须转换为当地并网资料包：逆变器证书、防孤岛设置、继电保护、反送电控制逻辑、单线图、计量设计、调试记录以及市政或配电主体批准表格。
gap.zht: 中國PCS或逆變器證據須轉換為當地併網資料包：逆變器證書、防孤島設定、繼電保護、反送電控制邏輯、單線圖、計量設計、調試記錄以及市政或配電主體批准表格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection where municipal, distributor, or utility embedded-generation approval applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese grid connection where State Grid / Southern Grid project requirements apply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T PCS or grid reports do not by themselves clear South African connection. Confirm NRS 097, inverter-list, municipal, and distributor requirements before energisation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T变流器或并网报告本身不能完成南非并网。送电前应确认NRS 097、逆变器清单、市政及配电主体要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T變流器或併網報告本身不能完成南非併網。送電前應確認NRS 097、逆變器清單、市政及配電主體要求。
